residualRisks: MockupPreviews still holds a large amount of composition logic even after the shared extractions, so future convergence work should keep pulling only clearly repeated motifs rather than broad refactors.
Storybook emits upstream eval and large-chunk warnings during build, but those warnings are tooling-level and the build itself passes.
result.summary: Shared mockup-gallery controls and the repeated spec-list motif are now exported reusable surfaces, the example app consumes the shared controls rather than local demo-only UI, the code/editor/diff family now supports richer metadata and one-sided states with direct story coverage, and the touched chat/docs/mock surfaces have stronger dark-mode contrast plus clearer focus/current states.
